title: SPEEDWOX 11PCS 1/4" -20 Washer Wing Nuts Hurricane Shutter Panel Washered Wingnuts 1/4-20 Shutter Wing Nut Driver and Washered Nut with Storage Box
features: 【WHAT YOU GET】1Pcs 1/4" Hex Shank Nut Driver, 10Pcs 1/4" -20 Washer Wing Nuts. Comes with a transparent storage box, easy to store and carry, not easy to lose, easy to store.
【MATERIAL】These wing nut driver bits are made of 40CR with a sandblasted surface, which is strong and reliable and not easy to corrode and rust.
【DESIGN】The butterfly nut driver kit has an ergonomic design that provides a comfortable grip so you can work efficiently.
【WING NUT DRIVER】Compatible with most drill bits to ensure durability and convenience, the 1/4 inch hex shank slotted socket can be used to easily tighten or loosen butterfly nuts for ease of use.
【APPLICATION】These wing nut bolts help secure metal storm panels to the house and can be used for hurricane shutter panels.
